This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] #1 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #5 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #6 Test that WebAssembly compilation succeeds (linking0.wast:1)
  assert_true: WebAssembly.compile failed unexpectedly with TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt at {loc} expected true got false
[FAIL] #7 Test that WebAssembly instantiation succeeds
  assert_true: unexpected instantiation error, observed TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'source') \n    at instance (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:207:15)\n    at linking0_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:8:10)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:32:3 expected true got false
[FAIL] #10 Test that a WebAssembly module is unlinkable
  assert_true: expected link error, observed TypeError: WebAssembly.instantiate(): Import #0 "Mt": module is not an object or function \n    at assert_unlinkable (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:410:15)\n    at linking0_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:18:1)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:32:3 expected true got false

  assert_true: expected runtime error, observed TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'call') \n    at assert_trap (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:269:15)\n    at linking0_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:21:1)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:32:3 expected true got false
[FAIL] #14 Test that a WebAssembly module is uninstantiable
  assert_true: expected link error, observed TypeError: WebAssembly.instantiate(): Import #0 "Mt": module is not an object or function \n    at assert_uninstantiable (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:433:15)\n    at linking0_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:27:1)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/linking0.wast.js:32:3 expected true got false
